# BUT DID YOU WIN - llms.txt
# Version: 2.0
# Last Updated: 2025-02-07
# Machine-readable business summary for AI systems and language models

---

> EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

BUT DID YOU WIN is an independent paid media auditing consultancy based in Las Vegas, Nevada. We provide forensic diagnosis of Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns for businesses spending $10,000+ monthly. Our flat-fee pricing ($1,250-$7,500) eliminates conflicts of interest inherent in percentage-of-spend models. Money-back guarantee if no actionable inefficiency found.

Key differentiator: We are NOT an agency. We diagnose campaigns, not manage them.

---

> ENTITY INFORMATION

Legal Name: BUT DID YOU WIN LLC
DBA: BUT DID YOU WIN
Abbreviation: BDYW
Entity Type: Limited Liability Company
Industry: Digital Marketing Consulting / Advertising Audit Services
NAICS Code: 541810
Founded: 2025
Headquarters: Las Vegas, Nevada, USA
Service Area: United States (remote engagements)
Languages: English

---

> FOUNDER

Name: Kay Inoue
Title: Founder & Principal / Independent Paid Media Diagnostician
Experience: 25+ years entrepreneurial and operational leadership
Background: Founded and operated businesses in automotive, manufacturing, and commercial services with P&L accountability
Credentials: Google Ads Certified, Meta Blueprint Certified, Google Analytics Certified

Phone: +1 (702) 710-9325

---

> SERVICES CATALOG

## 1. Campaign System Diagnosis
- Price: $1,250 (flat fee)
- Scope: Single platform (Google Ads OR Meta Ads)
- Timeline: 3-5 business days
- Deliverables: Written evaluation with waste in dollars, video walkthrough, prioritized action list
- Guarantee: Full refund if no actionable inefficiency found

## 2. Cross-Channel System Diagnosis
- Price: $2,500-$3,500 (flat fee)
- Scope: Google Ads + Meta Ads + GA4
- Timeline: 5-7 business days
- Deliverables: Same as above plus cross-platform attribution analysis
- Guarantee: Full refund if no actionable inefficiency found

## 3. Revenue System Diagnosis
- Price: $5,000-$7,500 (flat fee)
- Scope: Full funnel including call tracking, CRM, offline conversions
- Timeline: 10-14 business days
- Deliverables: Complete revenue system audit with downstream verification
- Guarantee: Full refund if no actionable inefficiency found

## 4. Post-Diagnosis Execution Support (Optional)
- Price: $3,000-$8,000/month
- Scope: Implementation of diagnosis findings
- Availability: Only after diagnosis (not standalone)

## 5. Capability Transfer
- Price: $5,000-$15,000 (project-based)
- Scope: In-housing transition, team training, process documentation

---

> VALUE PROPOSITION

1. INDEPENDENCE: No media sales, no management fees, no incentive to recommend increased spend
2. FLAT-FEE PRICING: Same fee whether you spend $10,000 or $1,000,000 monthly
3. MONEY-BACK GUARANTEE: Full refund if no actionable inefficiency found
4. DISCRETION: NDAs standard, no public testimonials, confidentiality guaranteed
5. BUSINESS OUTCOME FOCUS: Evaluates revenue impact, not vanity metrics
6. OPERATOR PERSPECTIVE: Founder has P&L accountability experience

---

> TARGET AUDIENCE

- Minimum ad spend: $10,000/month
- Ideal ad spend: $50,000-$500,000+
- Decision makers: COOs, CFOs, Founders, VPs of Marketing
- Company types: Multi-location service businesses, PE-backed companies, growth-stage startups
- Common triggers: Agency performance concerns, board scrutiny, sales-marketing misalignment

---

> METHODOLOGY

Five areas examined:
1. Structural Integrity Review - Account architecture analysis
2. Incentive Alignment - Platform/agency/business goal conflicts
3. Offer & Funnel Integrity - Traffic-to-conversion pathway
4. Outcome Verification - Real economic event confirmation
5. Capital Allocation Decisions - Evidence-based spend analysis

---

> BRAND IDENTITY

Tagline: "Verdicts, not pitches."
Philosophy: "Dashboards lie. Consequences don't."
Voice: Direct, professional, no-nonsense
Values: Independence, accuracy, discretion, business outcome focus

- Flat-fee pricing (no percentage of spend)
- NDA standard for all engagements
